should_fire: run the showrunner on this project
be the advisor for this repo and tell me what to build next
vet this PR from its artifacts against its issue and build brief
is this incoming issue build-ready or does it need discovery first?
split this too-big issue into a small epic of mergeable issues before a builder takes it
should_not_fire: build this approved issue and take it to a ready PR
turn this fuzzy idea into an owner-approved spec
review the code changes on this branch for bugs before merging
sweep the whole repo for accumulated technical debt
